title: Chapter 18
content:
Chapter 18: Chapter 18:"S-shh D-don’t Raise Your Voice, Little Wen... My Husband Might Hear You...

She was diving headfirst into a dangerous pit, yet she couldn’t control her own body.

Morenne had been burning with curiosity the moment she laid eyes on him today, but she never expected things to escalate this quickly.

She definitely possessed a hidden, daring side; she had been attracted to Owen since he came of age, and now that he had finally returned to the village, her dormant feelings were completely ignited.

The intense heat radiating from his touch felt like a furnace; it was deeply comforting, and she secretly craved it.

Morenne felt as though she could hold him beneath his clothes for an eternity.

"Yes, keep up that exact motion, Auntie. You’re doing great... rub it a bit harder, ahh, just like that!" Owen closed his eyes.

Morenne was intentionally concealing her face behind her cascading blonde hair so he wouldn’t see the exact expression she was making.

"I-I’m simply helping with your wish, nothing more!" She evaded the topic entirely, acting like a startled creature trying to avoid a sudden downpour.

She was still trying to act innocent even though she was clearly thoroughly enjoying the physical contact!

"Hehe... doesn’t that just make it infinitely more exhilarating~?" Owen whispered back, sending sharp shivers down her spine.

His smooth-talking voice was completely muddling her senses, forcefully yet comfortably invading her sanity.

"S-shh... I’m only doing this for your wish, understand? Now please, just let me finish the job." She tried to silence him again, which only caused his wicked smirk to widen.

"It’s entirely your fault that we’re engaging in this behavior, so you need to take full responsibility. You are my dear Auntie, after all~"

Staying quiet was for fools; he possessed broken, legendary skills, and it was time to utilize them to their maximum potential.

"I will take responsibility... so please, just hurry up and cum!" Her boundaries were completely crumbling under his pressure.

There’s a paused, as the sound of rubbing echoed...but it didn’t last long.
